content.full_text:
January 10, 2001

Elizabeth Aguire
City Clerk, City of Galt
380 Civic Drive
Galt, California 95632-2039

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 00-238

Dear Ms. Aguire:

On January 10, 2000, I met with you and the city attorney regarding the newly enacted campaign finance ordinance of the City of Galt. This letter is to confirm that because of our meeting you are no longer seeking written advice. Therefore, we are withdrawing your request. Please feel free to contact me in the future if you have any questions regarding this matter.

Sincerely,

Julia Bilaver, Staff Counsel
Legal Division
